title: cleyera japonica var. tricolor
intro: Cleyera japonica var. tricolor, also known as the three-colored cleyera, is a type of evergreen shrub native to Japan. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Cleyera japonica var. tricolor can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal uses.
